summary: Extracted the 3 inline writeShellScriptBin wrappers (zathura X11, sioyek Wayland-CSD, polkit-gnome agent) from modules/system/packages.nix into packages/*.nix, wired them through overlays/unstable-packages.nix via the kooha.nix prev.X positional-import pattern (avoiding self-referential infinite recursion for zathura/sioyek, callPackage for polkit), and deleted the stale flake.nix:62 MCPHub comment while preserving the accurate line-33 comment. Verified with nix flake check (post Phase 2/3/4), nix eval confirming exactly-once package membership, and a full nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa.

artifacts.summary: New self-referential zathura X11-force wrapper (positional-import kooha.nix-style signature)
New self-referential sioyek Wayland-CSD-disable wrapper (positional-import kooha.nix-style signature)
New polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1 PATH-exposing wrapper (standard callPackage signature)
Wired all 3 wrappers: zathura/sioyek via prev.X positional import, polkit via final.callPackage
Deleted 3 inline writeShellScriptBin blocks; kept bare zathura entry; added bare sioyek and polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1 entries
Deleted stale MCPHub 'official flake input' comment (was line 62), collapsed double blank line, preserved accurate line-33 comment
Implementation summary with full verification detail (nix flake check, nix eval, nixos-rebuild build)

completion_data.completion_summary: Extracted the 3 inline writeShellScriptBin wrappers (zathura X11, sioyek Wayland-CSD, polkit-gnome agent) from modules/system/packages.nix into packages/*.nix, wired them through overlays/unstable-packages.nix using the kooha.nix prev.X positional-import pattern (avoiding self-referential infinite recursion for zathura/sioyek), and deleted the stale flake.nix:62 MCPHub comment. Verified with nix flake check, nix eval (exactly-once package membership), and a full nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa.
